items.title: University Mission to Dakar for Psychology Education in Senegal
items.description: (ANSA) - IL CAIRO, 16 LUG - The Italian Ambassador to Dakar, Michele Tommasi, met with a delegation from the “G. d’Annunzio” University of Chieti-Pescara, which was on an institutional mission to Senegal as part of the preparation of an Erasmus+ Capacity Building in Higher Education project proposal. The mission, which involves Italian, French, and Senegalese partners, aims to strengthen university and scientific cooperation in the field of psychology in Senegal, with a particular focus on the development of education and research. The project is coordinated by Université Paris Cité (France) a
items.titleIt: University Mission to Dakar for Psychology Education in Senegal

items.title: Egypt receive a warm welcome home
items.description: Watch as the Egyptian football team return to a hero's welcome from their fans.
items.titleIt: Egypt receive a warm welcome home

items.title: Kenya: Linda Mwananchi Camp Concedes Defeat in Battle for ODM, Says Party Has Been Captured
items.description: [Capital FM] Nairobi -- A group of senior Orange Democratic Movement (ODM) leaders aligned to the Linda Mwananchi movement has declared that it has abandoned its bid to reclaim the party, saying it believes ODM has drifted away from the ideals of its late leader Raila Odinga and fallen under the influence of the Kenya Kwanza administration.
items.titleIt: Kenya: Linda Mwananchi Camp Concedes Defeat in Battle for ODM, Says Party Has Been Captured

items.title: Kenya: Makau Mutua Dismisses Ol Kalou Poll As 'Nothingburger', Says 2027 Will Not Be Decided in Mt Kenya
items.description: [Capital FM] Nairobi -- Presidential Advisor Makau Mutua has downplayed the political significance of the Ol Kalou parliamentary by-election, dismissing attempts to portray the opposition's victory as a bellwether for the 2027 General Election.
items.titleIt: Kenya: Makau Mutua Dismisses Ol Kalou Poll As 'Nothingburger', Says 2027 Will Not Be Decided in Mt Kenya

items.title: Kenya: Ganatra Elected As Inaugural President of Motorsport Kenya Federation
items.description: [Capital FM] Nairobi -- Altaf Ganatra has been elected as the inaugural president of the Motorsport Kenya Federation (MKF) in elections held on Friday at a Nairobi hotel.
items.titleIt: Kenya: Ganatra Elected As Inaugural President of Motorsport Kenya Federation

items.title: Kenya: Ruto Warned Against Underestimating Gachagua
items.description: [Capital FM] Nairobi -- Former Law Society of Kenya (LSK) President Nelson Havi has warned President William Ruto and leaders of the Broad-Based Government against dismissing Rigathi Gachagua's growing political influence, arguing that the Ol Kalou by-election has demonstrated the former Deputy President's strength in the Mt Kenya region.
items.titleIt: Kenya: Ruto Warned Against Underestimating Gachagua

items.title: Ethiopia: Libyan Professor Says Ethiopia's Pursuit to Sea Access Legal Right
items.description: [ENA] Addis Ababa -- Ethiopia's quest for sea access is firmly grounded in established legal principles, international law and regional agreements that guarantee landlocked states the right of access to the sea, the Libyan Professor Saad Salama, said.
items.titleIt: Ethiopia: Libyan Professor Says Ethiopia's Pursuit to Sea Access Legal Right

items.title: Kenya: Uber to Acquire Glovo in Kenya, Other Markets in Sh1.95tn Deal
items.description: [Capital FM] Nairobi -- U.S.-based mobility and delivery platform Uber is set to acquire Glovo Kenya after striking a deal to buy Berlin-based Delivery Hero's food delivery business across 50 markets.
items.titleIt: Kenya: Uber to Acquire Glovo in Kenya, Other Markets in Sh1.95tn Deal
